creator: pete@twisted.org.uk
text:
I just did another test - not on Linux, but on OpenIndiana (i.e. Solaris). mysql 5.7.15 works fine on there, so this is definitley a FreeBSD issue. I also mounted the FreeBSD zpool and used those files so I know the data is identical, and its the same machine so the hardware is identical. The only difference is the OS.

But you cannot reproduce this issue, yes ? Hmm, what can I do to help debug this now. I have a system here which shows the issue, its very reproducible with our data.
